text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru gives it her all on<n>the
chrysanthemum stage.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After the strenuous undertaking, she<n>states
joyfully that the gods have<n>made her the
incarnation of<n>happiness.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Concerned by the crazed glint in her<n>eye, I leave
most of her schedule<n>open until the Kinko Sho next
spring.
